rulings.Case Title: GUARDIANSHIP OF ANTHONY GEORGE CHOU-ROJAS
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #3, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/21/24. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) As of January 2008, the Judicial Council form Summary of Account must be used for all guardianship accounts. [Prob. C. Sect. 2620(a) and CRC 7.575.] (2) Original bank or brokerage statements must be filed to verify the ending balance(s) shown in the accounting. None appears to have been filed. [LRSF 14.34 D.] See CRC 7.575(b) for computer-generated printouts. (3) Notice must have attached to it the procedures for how to make a remote appearance by Zoom and CourtCall, as well as remote public access, as set out at https://sf.courts.ca.gov/divisions/probate-court. [LRSF 14.1 C.6.] (4) The attorney fee is not supported by any declaration. [CRC 7.751.] (5) It also appears that a non-attorney billed. If time was billed by a paralegal, the fee declaration must include a statement addressing his/her qualifications regarding the requirements of, and compliance with, Business & Professions Code Section 6450. Please provide a courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 5/10/24. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. (The records indicate that the minor was born on 4/2/15, not 4/5/15.)

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF NELLIE SEOW ENG YEO
rulings.Calendar Matter: REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/15/24. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) It appears that a courtesy copy of the ex parte petition and proposed order increasing bond were not delivered to the Probate Department upon filing, as required by LRSF 14.11 B., as the ex parte petition has not been entered into the tracking system by the clerk for it to be assigned to an examiner by the director. (2) Waivers of accounting have not been filed yet. If the other heirs will not waive an accounting, the first two-year accounting is already overdue. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. (Item 4 of an I&A should NOT be completed when a probate referee WAS appointed. Except for exhibits, each paper filed with the court must bear a footer in the bottom margin of each page, placed below the page number and divided from the rest of the document page by a printed line. [CRC 2.110(a).])

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF WILLIE ANDREWS
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The procedural issues previously posted have not been cleared: (1) Notice of Petition to Administer Estate [DE-121] was mailed; however, it failed to affirm #5 to mirror that the petition seeks IAEA authority. CRC 7.50. (2) Notice of Direction for Remote Appearances and Access to be served with the notice. LRSF 14.1.C.6). (3) Duties and Liabilities of Personal Representative [DE-147] to be filed. (4) Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number [JC Form DE-147S] to be filed. See the Local Rule of SF 14.18.E. (5) Petition #8 to identify each person's relationship to the decedent as the form instructs. (6) Petition #8 also needs to identify the trustee of the sole devisee trust. Depending on who the trustee is, trust beneficiaries need to be listed and noticed, if applicable. sec. 1208. (7) Petition #3.d to clarify the estimated value of the property, whether all $750K is for personal property only or real property only. (8) Petition #5.a. (3)-(4) to be clarified re: whether the decedent was or was not survived by a registered domestic partner. (9) Petitioner used the Judicial Council Form DE-111 by marking "Supplement" in the caption, which appears inappropriate. A verified supplement to petition, an amended petition, or an amendment to petition is needed. CRC 7.3 and 7.53. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MARGARITA VILLALTA-MOLINA
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/21/24. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) Notice was not given at least 15 days before this hearing to heir Jeronimo Albert Molina Villalta. (2) The petitioner's address cannot be in c/o her attorney. Item 8 of the petition must be supplemented with the proposed executor's/beneficiary's address. (3) A new Receipt of Acknowledgment of the Duties and Liabilities, likewise, must be filed, showing the proposed personal representative's address and phone. (4) The Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (Judicial Council Form DE-147S) is also required, pursuant to Probate Code Section 8404(b). Form DE-147S must be filed separately and confidentially with a cover sheet. Deadline is 5/10/24 for providing the assigned examiner courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JUDITH LENORE GARNIER
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required for the Court to determine whether to take this petition off calendar for lack of progress, as the following issues (e-mailed to petitioner in pro per on 02/05/2024 - see also tentative rulings for 02/27/2024 & 03/19/2024 hearings) remain unaddressed: 1) No original will has been filed. 2) No proposed order has been received. 3) No DE-147 form is on file. 4) No DE-147S form is on file. A pleading cover sheet must be attached to this form. 5) No DE-121 form is on file. The words "second amended" (petition) must be added where applicable on the form. A copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(C)(6) must be attached to and served with the form at least 15 days before the hearing. 6) No proof of publication is on file. The words "second amended" (petition) must be added where applicable in the published notice. 7) The box in the caption of the second amended petition to request IAEA authority was not checked. 8) Re item 3d of the second amended petition: i) Is the estate property the decedent's separate property, her one-half share of community property, or both? ii) Does the decedent's surviving spouse intend to make an election under Probate Code section 13502(a) to probate his share of the estate otherwise passing to him without probate administration, in lieu of proceeding with a spousal property petition? 9) The will is not self-proving because the attestation clause contained in the will failed to qualify as an affidavit under section 8220(b) and CCP section 2015.5. A proof of subscribing witness (DE-131 form) must be filed. 10) Re Ali Garnier: i) Please state his date of birth. ii) All persons having legal custody of and residing with him (e.g., both parents) must be identified and receive a separate copy of notice. CRC 7.51(d). 11) Item 9 of the second amended petition must specify the number of attachment pages. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.
